setups.name: Website Build Setup (Codex)
setups.description: Content-first website build pipeline for OpenAI Codex: 9 phases with 4 hard human review gates — strategy, IA, copy, validation and lo-fi wireframes, design tokens, UI primitives, page assembly, QA and launch. Includes phase skills, DoD checklists, artifact templates and stack conventions.

versions.notes: Initial release. 9-phase content-first pipeline with 4 hard review gates, 9 phase skills (Codex native .agents/skills format), per-phase DoD checklists, artifact templates, Tailwind v4 / Next.js App Router stack conventions, DTCG design tokens.
